mapper.select:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(total_amount) as amount FROM oms_order
deleted = 0
AND status = #{queryParams.status.value}
AND create_time >= #{queryParams.startDate}
AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{queryParams.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND ( order_sn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR user_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY status

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oms_order
deleted = 0
AND status IN
#{status}
AND create_time >= #{queryParams.startDate}
AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{queryParams.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND ( order_sn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR user_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payment_amount), 0) FROM oms_order
deleted = 0 AND status IN (2, 3, 4)
AND create_time >= #{queryParams.startDate}
AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{queryParams.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND ( order_sn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') OR user_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.keyword}, '%') )
